fixtures._comment: hitl-in-app — downgrade pill (#12346), 2nd turn. Same pattern as refund/escalate. Without this entry, the generic 'plan' catch-all in feature-parity.json hijacks the downgrade message.

response.content: Downgrade confirmed — Priya Shah (#12346) will move to the Starter plan effective next billing cycle.

fixtures._comment: hitl-in-app — downgrade pill (#12346). 1st turn: emit request_user_approval tool call. Specific userMessage substring takes precedence over the bare 'plan' fixture in feature-parity.json.
